response.body:
{
  "id": "{{randomValue type='UUID'}}",
  "listId": "{{request.pathSegments.[1]}}",
  "standardApplicantCode": "{{jsonPath request.body '$.standardApplicantCode'}}",
  "applicationCode": "{{jsonPath request.body '$.applicationCode'}}",
  "applicant": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.applicant')}}{{{jsonPath request.body '$.applicant'}}}{{else}}null{{/if}},
  "respondent": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.respondent')}}{{{jsonPath request.body '$.respondent'}}}{{else}}null{{/if}},
  "numberOfRespondents": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.numberOfRespondents')}}{{jsonPath request.body '$.numberOfRespondents'}}{{else}}0{{/if}},
  "wordingFields": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.wordingFields')}}{{{jsonPath request.body '$.wordingFields'}}}{{else}}[]{{/if}},
  "feeStatuses": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.feeStatuses')}}{{{jsonPath request.body '$.feeStatuses'}}}{{else}}[]{{/if}},
  "hasOffsiteFee": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.hasOffsiteFee')}}{{jsonPath request.body '$.hasOffsiteFee'}}{{else}}false{{/if}},
  "caseReference": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.caseReference')}}"{{jsonPath request.body '$.caseReference'}}"{{else}}null{{/if}},
  "accountNumber": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.accountNumber')}}"{{jsonPath request.body '$.accountNumber'}}"{{else}}null{{/if}},
  "notes": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.notes')}}"{{jsonPath request.body '$.notes'}}"{{else}}null{{/if}},
  "lodgementDate": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.lodgementDate')}}"{{jsonPath request.body '$.lodgementDate'}}"{{else}}"{{now format='yyyy-MM-dd'}}"{{/if}},
  "officials": {{#if (jsonPath request.body '$.officials')}}{{{jsonPath request.body '$.officials'}}}{{else}}[]{{/if}}
}
